prompt: Whimsical hand-painted illustration of a cute red-haired girl with rosy cheeks and blue eyes, wearing a teal sweater decorated with floral and heart patterns, smiling softly while a fluffy cream-colored kitten hangs upside down beside her face with one paw stretched upward.
